reviews.comment:
Ya soy socio vitalicio del club, me acompaño toda la vida y me salvó en varias oportunidades en los viajes que realice por Argentina, estoy muy agradecido por ello....en todos lados fue muy buena la atención de los empleados,mecánicos, auxilios...todos en gral...... Gracias...

(Translated by Google)
I'm now a lifetime member of the club. It's been with me my whole life and has saved me on several occasions during my trips around Argentina. I'm very grateful for that. Everywhere I went, the service from the staff, mechanics, and roadside assistance was excellent. Thank you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5bGV6aDFRRRAB
